changelog:
Protect oversized tool calls with adaptive high-risk buffering, bounded truncation recovery, request diagnostics, optional model fallback, and per-model maxToolTokens. Unlimited account polling now remains bounded by the total upstream attempt budget.
新增长工具调用保护：高风险工具自适应缓冲、有界截断恢复、请求诊断、可选模型回退及模型级 maxToolTokens；无限账号轮询仍受单请求上游总尝试数约束。
